scope: Repo-only plugin-kit hello-tool example aligned with AgenC's production plugin manifest contract

decisions.reason: PK-12 removed the dead public package ABI because agenc-core does not consume it. PK-08 therefore documents and verifies the live manifest-first plugin contract instead of reintroducing the removed ABI.
The example lives in agenc-plugin-kit for authors, but it is not part of the published package files while the package root remains reserved.

requiredBehaviors: The example uses .agenc-plugin/plugin.json as the canonical manifest location
The manifest declares a prompt command through a normalized relative source path
The manifest declares user configuration consumed by the MCP server environment
The example supplies a local stdio MCP server entrypoint
The server has a dependency-free self-test so repository validation does not require installing example dependencies
The normal server path imports the AgenC SDK and MCP SDK when the example package is installed
The core verify gate fails PK-08 if the sibling hello-tool example is missing
The core verify gate checks the example against the live runtime manifest and MCP-template contract
The core verify gate keeps the removed plugin-kit ABI out of the PK-08 completion path
